conditions.name: Appendicitis
conditions.explanation: Sharp lower right abdominal pain with fever and nausea are classic appendicitis symptoms

conditions.name: Gastroenteritis
conditions.explanation: Stomach flu can cause similar pain but usually more diffuse

data.action: Go to emergency room immediately for evaluation of possible appendicitis.
home_tips: Do not eat or drink anything
Have someone drive you to hospital
warning_signs: Severe pain that moves to lower right
data.disclaimer: This is AI information only, not medical advice. For emergencies call 115.
